ab: Kadaw, uniyan lra na kuca i ruma’, uwa cima’ da kuca.
ch: W:Kadaw，家裡沒有酒了，你去買酒。
en: Kadaw, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: ulra diya i sawka sadalilran, amana diya cemima’!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: saya dalilran adi pauwa, uwa diya cima’ duwa dalilran.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: cacima’ ku da kuca, menaniwan mu da kuca?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: ulra! cacima’ u pidaya?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: cacima’ ku da duwaya dalilran, di cacima’ ku diya da sayacavu na veras.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: ulra kani na veras, ulra diya nanu cacima’an?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還有要買的嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: cacima’ ku diya da vucinun, ulra mu?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: mupiya lra iniwan naniyam vucinun.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: cacima’ ku da kavang.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: maranger u cemima’ kana kemuda diyamaw?
ch: w:你想要買什麼樣子的嗎?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: cacima’ ku kana lrikeci tu ’aselr na kavang.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: kemuda ini na dangdalang?
en: How about this red one?

ab: ulra diya na duma na dulram?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: ulra diya na vulreci’ di na cangiya.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: ’aylra saya na cangiya na kavang.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: mukuwa u i iyan haremay? mukuwa u undowa?
ch: W:kacaw你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: kacaw, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: melri, mukuwa ku pulralranga kani mulri meniwan da kulang.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: ya! kemadu! miwari u nu karauv? mukasaya ta mekan kema ku.
ch: W:喔!這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: adi, yawa ku cemima’a da kavang.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: nu kemadu mu, marelranga ku kannu.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: ’inavayan! pidaya paisu ini na kulang?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: na kulang mu, saya vutu’ makavuca’an paisu.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: pidaya paisu ini na vurasi?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: na vurasi mu, saya tingting makatelun paisu.
en: Thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: ’aylra duwaya vutu’ kulang di saya tingting na vurasi.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
